topic: Supercharge Copilot Coding Agent with MCP Servers
hook: Copilot agent can now reach OUTSIDE GitHub using MCP. This changes everything.
audience: Developers building AI-assisted workflows and automation
keyTakeaway: MCP servers give Copilot coding agent access to external data and capabilities.
talkingPoints: Explain what MCP enables for Copilot coding agent
Show how to configure MCP servers in repository settings
Demo adding the official GitHub MCP Server
Walk through an example with external API data
Bonus: Copilot can see images in issues thanks to vision models
trendContext: Copilot coding agent now supports MCP server configuration in repo settings, plus vision models for images in issues.
